name: output-value-mismatch
comment: A step output (the canonical `KEY=value` line written to GITHUB_OUTPUT) has the same key but a different value. Downstream steps using `${{ steps.foo.outputs.version }}` will see one value locally and another remotely; any subsequent `if:` predicate that depends on the value may flip. The lines look textually trivial but they are functionally load-bearing.
